headline: Should Citi’s (C) US$30 Billion Buyback and Dividend Hike Require Action From Investors?
summary: Earlier this week, Citigroup Inc. announced a series of fixed-rate, senior unsecured callable notes maturing between 2036 and 2046, alongside its successful completion of the Federal Reserve’s 2026 stress test and plans to lift its quarterly dividend and initiate a multi-year US$30.00 billion share repurchase program. These moves highlight Citi’s focus on optimizing its capital structure while returning more cash to shareholders, even as it continues to invest in areas like digital assets...

headline: Citi Just Slapped a Massive $2,500 Price Target on SanDisk. Here’s Why They’re So Bullish
summary: Most of the Street holds more moderate views SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK), with the consensus 12-month target sitting at $1,912.04. Then Citi’s Asiya Merchant raised her target to $2,500 from $2,025 on June 25, 2026, maintaining a Buy landed and reset the ceiling. Consensus implies roughly flat from here. headline: TeraWulf gains bullish initiation from Citi on AI data center growth outlook
summary: Investing.com -- TeraWulf received a bullish initiation from Citi, which launched coverage of the company with a Buy/High-Risk rating and a $36 price target, citing long-term growth opportunities tied to rising demand for high-performance computing (HPC) and artificial intelligence infrastructure.

headline: Citi flags open-source moment in AI as model access tightens
summary: Citi has said open-source artificial intelligence models are gaining momentum, as regulators block access to some frontier models and slow the release of others.
